disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden-onset pounding, racing heartbeat with a tight, painful sensation in the chest, beginning within the last few hours
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what your heart and chest feel like?
When did the chest and heart symptoms start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding and racing so hard it actually hurts in my chest, and it came on suddenly tonight out of nowhere.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse diaphoresis accompanying the episode — sweating through clothing
trigger_question_examples: What else is your body doing right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm absolutely drenched—sweating right through my clothes—and my hands are trembling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest sensation is a pounding tightness and does not spread to the arm, neck or jaw, and is not the crushing central pain the patient would expect from a heart attack
trigger_question_examples: Does the chest pain spread anywhere — into your arm, neck or jaw?
Is it a crushing or heavy pressure, or more of a pounding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more of a pounding tightness with the racing—it doesn't really spread into my arm or jaw, and it's not a crushing weight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms are strictly tied to the hours before a high-stakes workplace evaluation and do not occur at rest at other times
trigger_question_examples: Was anything going on when this started?
Do you ever get these symptoms at other times, or only around this review?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It only hits me before big evaluations at work—I don't get this racing and blanking just sitting around on a normal day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute, profound situational working-memory failure — unable to recall basic facts such as own phone number, despite being fully alert and articulate
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned blanking — what is that like?
Are you having any trouble thinking or remembering?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My mind has just gone totally blank—I can talk to you fine but I can't remember my presentation or even my own phone number right now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No known heart disease, no chest pain on exertion previously, no excessive caffeine and no stimulant or recreational drug use
trigger_question_examples: Any history of heart problems, or chest pain when you exert yourself?
How much caffeine do you have, and any other stimulants or drugs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No heart problems that I know of, no chest pain when I exercise, and I barely touch caffeine—no other stimulants at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ongoing emotional exhaustion and burnout from sustained work pressure, with frustration and self-doubt after previous evaluations
trigger_question_examples: How have you been coping in yourself with all this work pressure?
How have previous reviews left you feeling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I'm exhausted—constantly feeling I have to prove myself has worn me down, and past evaluations left me really frustrated and doubting myself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No thoughts of self-harm or suicide on sensitive screening; distress is centred on the work evaluation, not on wanting to harm self
trigger_question_examples: When people are this overwhelmed, they sometimes have thoughts of not wanting to be here — are you having any thoughts like that?
Have you had any thoughts of harming yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No—nothing like that. I don't want to hurt myself, I'm just terrified about this review and about what my heart is doing.
